data.boss_ai_decision:
STATUS: Data strongly favors a Home Win.
REASON: KuPS demonstrates superior xG (1.79 vs 1.13) and PPG (2.14 vs 0.5) compared to Ilves. Bookmaker odds (1.67) align with this clear favoritism for the home side.
CONCLUSION: Home Win.
